curation_notes: Locations derived from the patch diff which modifies only src/stack.rs. The primary vulnerability is in push_cloned which calls push_inner; push_inner increments next_ofs (committing stack space) before data is written. push_cloned then calls val.clone() in a loop, which can panic, leaving the stack in an inconsistent state where the destructor double-frees or drops uninitialized memory. CWE-415 (Double Free) maps correctly to use-after-free. No sibling files contain the same vulnerability pattern.
